title: SDIP Calibration Schema
description: Per-practitioner state columns the harness tracks across the relationship.

name.description: Column name. Must be a valid SQL identifier in lowercase snake_case.

default.description: Default value when the column is initialized.

monotonic.description: If true, the column may only advance, never regress. Enforced by the harness via MAX(current, new).

description.description: Human-readable description of what this column tracks.

advancement_detector.description: Identifier of the detector that proposes advancements. Either 'builtin:{name}' for HarmonAI reference detectors, or 'tradition:{name}' for tradition-specific detectors implemented in the bundle's detectors/ directory.

inject_as.description: XML tag name under which this column is injected into the system prompt. E.g., 'doctrinal_fluency_level'.

inject_block_builder.description: Identifier of the block builder that constructs the injection text from the column value.

schema_ref.description: For json-type columns: path to a JSON schema describing the column's structure.
